_format.note: The behavioral rules that drive patients. Each fixation is a function (implemented in src/fixation.js by the same key) that, given the current session state, returns the patient's intended move ('press' | 'hold' | 'yield') for the upcoming beat. Some fixations are deterministic puzzles (Mosshorn always Holds). Others are reactive (Pyrelord mirrors). The player infers the fixation from the patient's voice — the 'hint' in patients.json — and through the tells they observe. Once a patient is encountered 'revealAt' times, the archive reveals the fixation's name and description to the player.
_format.naming: Names are written in the institutional voice — short, clinical, slightly off. They appear in the archive after the reveal threshold.

locked_hold.name: Catatonia
locked_hold.desc: Plays HOLD every beat. Never presses. Never yields.

refuse_yield.name: Refusal
refuse_yield.desc: Never plays YIELD. Alternates PRESS and HOLD with weight toward PRESS.

compulsion_press.name: Compulsion
compulsion_press.desc: After any PRESS, plays PRESS again next beat. Cannot stop once begun.

sink_hold.name: Sink
sink_hold.desc: When the patient's composure is at or below half, plays HOLD every beat. Above half, varies.

bound_hold_then.name: Tending
bound_hold_then.desc: Plays HOLD for the first 3 beats. After that, plays PRESS or YIELD only.

bound_until_low.name: Kept
bound_until_low.desc: Plays HOLD until composure drops below one third. After that, only PRESS.

echo_last.name: Echo
echo_last.desc: Plays whatever move they played the previous beat. First beat is random.

drift_cycle.name: Loop
drift_cycle.desc: Cycles YIELD → HOLD → PRESS → YIELD → HOLD → PRESS in fixed order. Starts at YIELD.

mirror.name: Mirror
mirror.desc: Plays whichever move BEATS the player's last move. First beat is random.

counter_last.name: Answer
counter_last.desc: Plays whichever move BEATS the player's last move. (Same as Mirror but with a 1-in-4 chance of repeating the player's move instead.)

forget_tell.name: Forgetting
forget_tell.desc: Their tell lies 35% of the time — shows the wrong move.

invert_tell.name: Inversion
invert_tell.desc: Their tell shows one move but they always play the move that BEATS that one.

watch_no_lie.name: Watch
watch_no_lie.desc: Their tell is always truthful. But every third beat, they play PRESS regardless of what the tell said.

pull_drain.name: Pull
pull_drain.desc: Each beat, the patient drains 1 composure from the player. Their played move is otherwise random across all three.

grow_each_beat.name: Growth
grow_each_beat.desc: Each beat, their strength rises by 10%. Their played move is otherwise random across all three.

climb_on_clash.name: Climb
climb_on_clash.desc: After any clash (your move and theirs tie), they play PRESS next beat. Otherwise random.

anchor_press.name: Anchor
anchor_press.desc: Every fourth beat, plays PRESS regardless of what the tell said. Otherwise random.

warden_shift.name: Keeping
warden_shift.desc: The Warden shifts. First third of his composure: Tending. Middle third: Mirror. Final third: Climb. He keeps the desk through each.
